bodyText:
Ashcott Beer Fest is run by volunteers, so we don’t publish private addresses or phone numbers.

For For all inquiries please use email below or leave a message on our Facebook pages and someone on the committee will contact you.

We also hire out our Marquees over the summer (when we aren’t using them) which also goes towards the fund raising.

emails.subject: Sponsors Enquires
emails.emailBody: I would like to sponsor a (barrel of beer/cider/Entertainment/Food) for this year beer fest.

emails.subject: Volunteer Enquires
emails.emailBody: I would be willing to help out with a shift in (Bar/Entrance/Food/Site) for this year beer fest.

emails.subject: Marquee Enquires
emails.emailBody: I would like to hire (The Blue and White/The Canvas) marquee for date of ……. Please send me a quote.
